user_profile.description: Durable facts the user stated about themselves across conversation threads.

suggested_fields.email: Contact email when the user agreed to share it
suggested_fields.name: User name if the user mentioned it
suggested_fields.company: Company or organization the user named
suggested_fields.notes: Other facts the user said about themselves (not assistant content)

dialog_summary.description: Running summary of what the user has said in the current conversation thread. Omit fields you cannot infer from user messages.

suggested_fields.tech_stack: Technologies or platforms the user named (free text or list)
suggested_fields.services_discussed: EffectiveSoft services or topics the user asked about or showed interest in
suggested_fields.case_study_interests: Case study domains or examples the user asked for or reacted to
suggested_fields.constraints: Budget, timeline, compliance, or other limits the user stated
suggested_fields.next_steps: Follow-ups the user requested or agreed to (not bot suggestions)
suggested_fields.notes: Other user-stated facts only — never assistant recommendations or bot replies
